features.featureTitle: Redesign the main feed (HomePage) so each video post card occupies exactly one full screen height (100dvh or 100vh). The feed should be a vertically scrollable container with scroll-snap enabled (snap-type: y mandatory), so swiping/scrolling always lands on exactly one card at a time — no partial cards visible. The header should either overlay the feed or be excluded from the card height calculation so the card video+content fills the remaining viewport below it.
